judge_reason: Description A claims handwritten annotations including a circled 'RD', a signature 'Fletcher', and file numbers/dates, while Description B states there are no photographs, sketches, or illustrations and implies only typed text, representing a direct contradiction on the presence and nature of visual content.
original_image_tags: A standard US Government Office Memorandum form. Handwritten annotations include a circled "RD" near the top right, a large handwritten signature that appears to read "Fletcher" on the right side, and various file numbers and dates stamped or written at the bottom.
